name: Festive Sweet and Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken, cut into chunks
1 small Yellow onion, cut into wedges
1 can Chun King Sliced Water Chestnuts (8 oz)
1 can Chun King Cow Mein Noodles, warmed (5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Combine the reserved juice with ketchup, cider vinegar, brown sugar, cornstarch, and soy sauce in a bowl. Stir until well blended.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet.
4. Add the chicken chunks to the hot oil and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
6. Add the chopped bell pepper and onion to the pan, and continue stir-frying for an additional 3 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
7. Stir in the sliced water chestnuts and the reserved juice mixture.
8. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce boils and thickens.
9. Return the chicken to the pan and add the pineapple chunks.
10. Heat through and cook for a few more seconds, ensuring all ingredients are heated evenly.
11. Serve over warmed Chow Mein noodles.
